name: Khao Soy Curried Egg Noodles with Chicken
intro: on menus all over the globe. Serve this when you need a pick-me-up (or even when you don’t!).

ingredients.item: sashimi- grade salmon, hamachi, scallops, or lightly poached shrimp, lobster, crab legs or surimi
bird’s eye chilies, fi nely sliced
chopped Thai garlic or 1 teaspoon if using regular garlic
small bitter melon, sliced and blanched
Thai garlic, peeled, cloves fi nely sliced. If using regular garlic, use less and add to taste

method: If you cannot fi nd ready-sliced fi sh, you slice it against the grain in half-inch-wide pieces or, if using lobster tail, slice it cross-wise (make sure your knife is very sharp).
